narratives.narrative: Threat actor CDB-FIN-09 has been observed in 2 intelligence signals. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1566, T1555, T1190, T1539, T1195. Average risk score: 10.0/10. Assessment: This actor poses an immediate threat requiring defensive action.

Threat actor CDB-APT-22 has been observed in 3 intelligence signals. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1555, T1190, T1027, T1059, T1195. Average risk score: 9.7/10. Assessment: This actor poses an immediate threat requiring defensive action.

stix_transport.note: TLS 1.3 uses ECDHE — quantum vulnerable for key exchange

jwt_tokens.note: Symmetric crypto — quantum resistant (Grover halves keyspace)

S9_Quantum.recommendation: Begin hybrid key exchange deployment. Inventory all RSA/ECDSA usage for PQC migration.
